title: Authorship Provisions in AUGMENT - 1984 (OAD,2250,)
description: Visit the Doug Engelbart Institute to explore his remarkable legacy and all it inspires (official site)

sentences.text: Abstract
sentences.markdown: Abstract

sentences.text: AUGMENT is a text processing system marketed by Tymshare for a multi-user, network environment.
sentences.markdown: AUGMENT is a text processing system marketed by Tymshare for a multi-user, network environment.

sentences.text: In AUGMENT's frontend is a User Interface System that facilitates flexible evolution of command languages and provides optional command recognition features.
sentences.markdown: In AUGMENT's frontend is a User Interface System that facilitates flexible evolution of command languages and provides optional command recognition features.

sentences.text: Exceptionally fast and flexible control of interactive operations is enabled by concurrent action of mouse and optional one-handed chord keyset.
sentences.markdown: Exceptionally fast and flexible control of interactive operations is enabled by concurrent action of mouse and optional one-handed chord keyset.

sentences.text: Files are hierarchically structured, and textual address expressions can flexibly specify any text entity in any file.
sentences.markdown: Files are hierarchically structured, and textual address expressions can flexibly specify any text entity in any file.

sentences.text: The screen may be divided into arbitrary, rectangular windows, allowing cross-file editing between windows.
sentences.markdown: The screen may be divided into arbitrary, rectangular windows, allowing cross-file editing between windows.

sentences.text: Many options exist for controlling the "view" of a file's text in a window, e.g.: level clipping, paragraph truncation, and content filtering.
sentences.markdown: Many options exist for controlling the "view" of a file's text in a window, e.g.: level clipping, paragraph truncation, and content filtering.

sentences.text: Structural study and modification of on-line documents are especially facilitated.
sentences.markdown: Structural study and modification of on-line documents are especially facilitated.

sentences.text: A Journal system and "Shared Screen Teleconferencing" support collaboration among authors and their colleagues.
sentences.markdown: A Journal system and "Shared Screen Teleconferencing" support collaboration among authors and their colleagues.

sentences.text: Graphic illustrations may be embedded in the same file with text.
sentences.markdown: Graphic illustrations may be embedded in the same file with text.

sentences.text: Introduction
sentences.markdown: Introduction

sentences.text: AUGMENT was designed for augmenting human intellectual capabilities.
sentences.markdown: AUGMENT was designed for augmenting human intellectual capabilities.

sentences.text: It was targeted particularly toward the core work of professionals engaged in "tough knowledge work" -- e.g., planning, analyzing, and designing in complex problem domains.
sentences.markdown: It was targeted particularly toward the core work of professionals engaged in "tough knowledge work" -- e.g., planning, analyzing, and designing in complex problem domains.

sentences.text: And special attention was paid to augmenting group collaboration among workers pursuing common goals.
sentences.markdown: And special attention was paid to augmenting group collaboration among workers pursuing common goals.

sentences.text: Authorship has received a great deal of attention in AUGMENT's evolution, as one of the central human activities to be augmented.
sentences.markdown: Authorship has received a great deal of attention in AUGMENT's evolution, as one of the central human activities to be augmented.

sentences.text: An important set of provisions within AUGMENT -- in its architecture, design principles, and specific features -- is directly aimed toward bringing high performance to the authorship activities of knowledge workers.
sentences.markdown: An important set of provisions within AUGMENT -- in its architecture, design principles, and specific features -- is directly aimed toward bringing high performance to the authorship activities of knowledge workers.

sentences.text: For the purposes of this paper, we thus speak interchangeably of "knowledge worker" and "author."
sentences.markdown: For the purposes of this paper, we thus speak interchangeably of "knowledge worker" and "author."

sentences.text: We recognize explicitly that highly skilled workers in any field, and knowledge work is no exception, are those with good command of their tools.
sentences.markdown: We recognize explicitly that highly skilled workers in any field, and knowledge work is no exception, are those with good command of their tools.

sentences.text: Our basic design goal was to provide a set of tools that would not themselves limit the capabilities of the people using them.
sentences.markdown: Our basic design goal was to provide a set of tools that would not themselves limit the capabilities of the people using them.

sentences.text: A system designed to encourage more skilled workers will always enable higher human performance than one designed to support less skilled workers.
sentences.markdown: A system designed to encourage more skilled workers will always enable higher human performance than one designed to support less skilled workers.

sentences.text: In this regard, our design goal was to provide as much capability as possible for each level of system usage skill, and a continuous evolution path between skill levels.
sentences.markdown: In this regard, our design goal was to provide as much capability as possible for each level of system usage skill, and a continuous evolution path between skill levels.

sentences.text: We believe firmly that knowledge workers are motivated to grow in knowledge and skill and that provisions in system design should support this.
sentences.markdown: We believe firmly that knowledge workers are motivated to grow in knowledge and skill and that provisions in system design should support this.

sentences.text: As the rest of the paper reveals, this approach translates into a rich set of AUGMENT provisions, aimed at providing speed and flexibility for skilled workers in organizing and pursuing their core knowledge work -- in which "authorship" is a primary activity.
sentences.markdown: As the rest of the paper reveals, this approach translates into a rich set of AUGMENT provisions, aimed at providing speed and flexibility for skilled workers in organizing and pursuing their core knowledge work -- in which "authorship" is a primary activity.

sentences.text: An explicit sub-goal in AUGMENT's development was to "augment" the development, production and control of complex technical documentation -- through the whole cycle of gathering information, planning, creating, collaborating, reviewing, editing, controlling versions, designing layout, and producing the final documents.
sentences.markdown: An explicit sub-goal in AUGMENT's development was to "augment" the development, production and control of complex technical documentation -- through the whole cycle of gathering information, planning, creating, collaborating, reviewing, editing, controlling versions, designing layout, and producing the final documents.

sentences.text: This paper concentrates upon the development phase of this cycle.
sentences.markdown: This paper concentrates upon the development phase of this cycle.

sentences.text: AUGMENT has well-developed tools to support the later, production phase, but their discussion is not included here.
sentences.markdown: AUGMENT has well-developed tools to support the later, production phase, but their discussion is not included here.

sentences.text: Studying another's work provides a well-recognized challenge, but one of the toughest jobs is to study one's own work during its development: to see what it really says about Issue X; to see if it does provide for Concept Y; to see if it is reasonably organized and structured -- and to do these over a body of material before it is "polished", i.e., before it is well structured, coherently worded, non-redundant and consistently termed.
sentences.markdown: Studying another's work provides a well-recognized challenge, but one of the toughest jobs is to study one's own work during its development: to see what it really says about Issue X; to see if it does provide for Concept Y; to see if it is reasonably organized and structured -- and to do these over a body of material before it is "polished", i.e., before it is well structured, coherently worded, non-redundant and consistently termed.

sentences.text: Some Background
sentences.markdown: Some Background

sentences.text: History
sentences.markdown: History

sentences.text: AUGMENT is an integrated system of knowledge-worker tools that is marketed by Tymshare's Office Automation Division.
sentences.markdown: AUGMENT is an integrated system of knowledge-worker tools that is marketed by Tymshare's Office Automation Division.

sentences.text: The system was developed at SRI International over an extended period under the sponsorship of NASA, DARPA, and RADC.
sentences.markdown: The system was developed at SRI International over an extended period under the sponsorship of NASA, DARPA, and RADC.

sentences.text: Commercial rights were transferred to Tymshare in 1978 (where the system has since been renamed from NLS to AUGMENT) and its evolution continued.
sentences.markdown: Commercial rights were transferred to Tymshare in 1978 (where the system has since been renamed from NLS to AUGMENT) and its evolution continued.

sentences.text: A short history of AUGMENT's development may be found in <Ref-1>, along with a summary of system characteristics and features.
sentences.markdown: A short history of AUGMENT's development may be found in <Ref-1>, along with a summary of system characteristics and features.

sentences.text: The general R&D philosophy and the design principles behind AUGMENT'S development are laid out in <Ref-2>.
sentences.markdown: The general R&D philosophy and the design principles behind AUGMENT'S development are laid out in <Ref-2>.

sentences.text: The system evolved on time-shared, mainframe computers, and in a packet-switched network environment.
sentences.markdown: The system evolved on time-shared, mainframe computers, and in a packet-switched network environment.

sentences.text: In 1970 our computer was the second to be attached to the ARPANET, and since 1978 we have also operated extensively in the TYMNET environment.
sentences.markdown: In 1970 our computer was the second to be attached to the ARPANET, and since 1978 we have also operated extensively in the TYMNET environment.

sentences.text: We have benefited directly from both the time-sharing and the network environments in matters that are important to the authorship process -- especially in dealing with large documents and multi-party documentation activities.
sentences.markdown: We have benefited directly from both the time-sharing and the network environments in matters that are important to the authorship process -- especially in dealing with large documents and multi-party documentation activities.

sentences.text: In 1976-77 we conducted some applied studies for the Air Force, as reported in <Ref-3> and <Ref-4>, which concentrated upon this latter application.
sentences.markdown: In 1976-77 we conducted some applied studies for the Air Force, as reported in <Ref-3> and <Ref-4>, which concentrated upon this latter application.

sentences.text: Relevant Architectural Features
sentences.markdown: Relevant Architectural Features

sentences.text: Perhaps AUGMENT's most unique architectural feature is its User Interface System (UIS), a special software module, which handles the human/computer interfaces to all interactive programs.
sentences.markdown: Perhaps AUGMENT's most unique architectural feature is its User Interface System (UIS), a special software module, which handles the human/computer interfaces to all interactive programs.

sentences.text: It takes care of all command-language dialog and connection protocols, and provides a framework for building a coherent and integrated user environment while supporting flexible evolution on both sides: on the user's side, with evolution of command function and terminology; and on the technology side, with evolving hardware and software.
sentences.markdown: It takes care of all command-language dialog and connection protocols, and provides a framework for building a coherent and integrated user environment while supporting flexible evolution on both sides: on the user's side, with evolution of command function and terminology; and on the technology side, with evolving hardware and software.

sentences.text: (Design details are outlined in <Ref-5>; rationale and utilization in <Ref-6>.)
sentences.markdown: (Design details are outlined in <Ref-5>; rationale and utilization in <Ref-6>.)

sentences.text: The UIS provides a reach-through service to non-AUGMENT systems, and can optionally translate back and forth to a foreign program's command language.
sentences.markdown: The UIS provides a reach-through service to non-AUGMENT systems, and can optionally translate back and forth to a foreign program's command language.

sentences.text: It also supports the shared-screen, remote collaboration capability discussed below.
sentences.markdown: It also supports the shared-screen, remote collaboration capability discussed below.

sentences.text: AUGMENT's architecture provides for open-ended expansion and flexible evolution of system functionality and worker command languages.
sentences.markdown: AUGMENT's architecture provides for open-ended expansion and flexible evolution of system functionality and worker command languages.

sentences.text: It is assumed that for any class of knowledge workers, specialized application systems developed by other parties, perhaps running on other computers, will provide services worth integrating.
sentences.markdown: It is assumed that for any class of knowledge workers, specialized application systems developed by other parties, perhaps running on other computers, will provide services worth integrating.

sentences.text: The "author class" of worker should be no exception.
sentences.markdown: The "author class" of worker should be no exception.

sentences.text: Continuing evolution toward the "author workshop of the future" will certainly depend upon some such features in workshop architecture.
sentences.markdown: Continuing evolution toward the "author workshop of the future" will certainly depend upon some such features in workshop architecture.

sentences.text: It provides adaptation for different terminal characteristics, enabling application programers to work as though with a virtual terminal.
sentences.markdown: It provides adaptation for different terminal characteristics, enabling application programers to work as though with a virtual terminal.

sentences.text: File Characteristics
sentences.markdown: File Characteristics

sentences.text: AUGMENT employs explicitly structured files, with hierarchically organized nodes; each node can contain either or all of: up to 2,000 characters of text, a graphic structure, or other forms of useful data (e.g., digitized speech).
sentences.markdown: AUGMENT employs explicitly structured files, with hierarchically organized nodes; each node can contain either or all of: up to 2,000 characters of text, a graphic structure, or other forms of useful data (e.g., digitized speech).

sentences.text: The worker has a definite model in mind for the structuring of any file that he works with; in composing and modifying it he can organize and modify structure using the same verbs as for working with text strings (e.g. Insert, Replace, Move, Copy, Delete), with appropriate structural-entity nouns (e.g., Statement, Branch, Group, Plex).
sentences.markdown: The worker has a definite model in mind for the structuring of any file that he works with; in composing and modifying it he can organize and modify structure using the same verbs as for working with text strings (e.g. Insert, Replace, Move, Copy, Delete), with appropriate structural-entity nouns (e.g., Statement, Branch, Group, Plex).

sentences.text: For any existing hierarchical structure, he has many flexible alternatives for addressing its entities, modifying its organization, jumping around within it, and viewing it in a most beneficial manner.
sentences.markdown: For any existing hierarchical structure, he has many flexible alternatives for addressing its entities, modifying its organization, jumping around within it, and viewing it in a most beneficial manner.

sentences.text: (Note: AUGMENT workers generally use the term "statement" to refer to a file node, which is natural enough since the terminology became established before we added the graphic capability.
sentences.markdown: (Note: AUGMENT workers generally use the term "statement" to refer to a file node, which is natural enough since the terminology became established before we added the graphic capability.

sentences.text: Now an AUGMENT "statement" can contain either or both a text statement and a graphic diagram.)
sentences.markdown: Now an AUGMENT "statement" can contain either or both a text statement and a graphic diagram.)

sentences.text: Controlling the Tools
sentences.markdown: Controlling the Tools

sentences.text: Many of AUGMENT's unique author-support provisions address basic operations common to almost every task, things done over and over again.
sentences.markdown: Many of AUGMENT's unique author-support provisions address basic operations common to almost every task, things done over and over again.

sentences.text: These operations, executed with speed and flexibility, provide for composing and modifying one's working material, and for studying what is there over a wide range of substantive levels -- from a single text passage to a collection of end-product draft documents and their associated set of working notes, reference material, and recorded-message dialog (assuming all to be on line).
sentences.markdown: These operations, executed with speed and flexibility, provide for composing and modifying one's working material, and for studying what is there over a wide range of substantive levels -- from a single text passage to a collection of end-product draft documents and their associated set of working notes, reference material, and recorded-message dialog (assuming all to be on line).

sentences.text: In the early stages of our program at SRI, we did a great deal of detailed work on what we called the "control interface" -- how users control the functional application of their tools.
sentences.markdown: In the early stages of our program at SRI, we did a great deal of detailed work on what we called the "control interface" -- how users control the functional application of their tools.

sentences.text: These details can be very important to "low-level" interactions which are done hundreds of times during a working day.
sentences.markdown: These details can be very important to "low-level" interactions which are done hundreds of times during a working day.

sentences.text: Some of these details are quite relevant to bringing high performance to the authorship process.
sentences.markdown: Some of these details are quite relevant to bringing high performance to the authorship process.

sentences.text: AUGMENT commands are expressed with verbs, nouns, and appropriate qualifier words; every command word is designated by entering one or more characters.
sentences.markdown: AUGMENT commands are expressed with verbs, nouns, and appropriate qualifier words; every command word is designated by entering one or more characters.

sentences.text: The UIS recognizes the command word from these characters according to the command-recognition options designated in each individual's "profile file."
sentences.markdown: The UIS recognizes the command word from these characters according to the command-recognition options designated in each individual's "profile file."

sentences.text: Users seem to migrate fairly rapidly to "expert" recognition modes, where a minimum number of characters will elicit recognition of command words.
sentences.markdown: Users seem to migrate fairly rapidly to "expert" recognition modes, where a minimum number of characters will elicit recognition of command words.

sentences.text: The fully spelled-out command words are presented in the Command Feedback Window as soon as they are recognized.
sentences.markdown: The fully spelled-out command words are presented in the Command Feedback Window as soon as they are recognized.

sentences.text: The Backspace Key will cause backup, one command word at a time.
sentences.markdown: The Backspace Key will cause backup, one command word at a time.

sentences.text: Of the system requirements behind our choice of this noun-verb command form, two are particularly relevant here: (1) The "vocabulary" of the functions of the tools, and of the entities they operate upon, must be as extensible as is a natural language; (2) Textual lists of commands must conveniently lend themselves to writing, documenting, and executing as "macro" commands.
sentences.markdown: Of the system requirements behind our choice of this noun-verb command form, two are particularly relevant here: (1) The "vocabulary" of the functions of the tools, and of the entities they operate upon, must be as extensible as is a natural language; (2) Textual lists of commands must conveniently lend themselves to writing, documenting, and executing as "macro" commands.

sentences.text: Screen selection is done with a mouse.
sentences.markdown: Screen selection is done with a mouse.

sentences.text: If the command's noun is a single, defined text or structure entity, e.g., a "word", then there is only one selection needed (e.g., to pick any character in the designated word).
sentences.markdown: If the command's noun is a single, defined text or structure entity, e.g., a "word", then there is only one selection needed (e.g., to pick any character in the designated word).

sentences.text: Besides using a standard keyboard for character entry, an AUGMENT user may optionally use a five-key, one-hand, chord keyset.
sentences.markdown: Besides using a standard keyboard for character entry, an AUGMENT user may optionally use a five-key, one-hand, chord keyset.

sentences.text: Remarkably little practice is required in order to enter alphabetic characters, one hand-stroke per character.
sentences.markdown: Remarkably little practice is required in order to enter alphabetic characters, one hand-stroke per character.

sentences.text: With less than five hours practice, a person can begin profitably working in a two-handed, concurrent mode -- operating the mouse with one hand and simultaneously entering command characters and short literal strings with the other hand.
sentences.markdown: With less than five hours practice, a person can begin profitably working in a two-handed, concurrent mode -- operating the mouse with one hand and simultaneously entering command characters and short literal strings with the other hand.

sentences.text: Here is an example of a low-level action which reveals some basic characteristics of high-performance execution.
sentences.markdown: Here is an example of a low-level action which reveals some basic characteristics of high-performance execution.

sentences.text: It is a very simple situation, but representative of what is met over and over and over again in doing hard knowledge work.
sentences.markdown: It is a very simple situation, but representative of what is met over and over and over again in doing hard knowledge work.

sentences.text: The worker is composing or modifying something in one area of the screen, when his eye catches a one-character typo in another area.
sentences.markdown: The worker is composing or modifying something in one area of the screen, when his eye catches a one-character typo in another area.

sentences.text: For a skilled AUGMENT worker, the typo could be corrected in less time than it would take someone to point it out to him -- with three quick strokes of the keyset hand during a casual flick of the mouse hand, and an absolute minimum of visual and mental attention taken from the other ongoing task.
sentences.markdown: For a skilled AUGMENT worker, the typo could be corrected in less time than it would take someone to point it out to him -- with three quick strokes of the keyset hand during a casual flick of the mouse hand, and an absolute minimum of visual and mental attention taken from the other ongoing task.

sentences.text: Fast, flexible, graceful, low effort -- these are important to all high-frequency, low-level, knowledge-work actions.
sentences.markdown: Fast, flexible, graceful, low effort -- these are important to all high-frequency, low-level, knowledge-work actions.

sentences.text: This same kind of speed and flexibility are achieved by skilled AUGMENT workers in executing all of the other functional features described below.
sentences.markdown: This same kind of speed and flexibility are achieved by skilled AUGMENT workers in executing all of the other functional features described below.

sentences.text: Description of mouse and keyset, and their concurrent employment, may be found in <Ref-7>.
sentences.markdown: Description of mouse and keyset, and their concurrent employment, may be found in <Ref-7>.

sentences.text: Addressing the Working Materials
sentences.markdown: Addressing the Working Materials

sentences.text: There is a consistent set of addressing features that a worker may use in any command to designate a particular structural node or some element of text or graphics attached to that node.
sentences.markdown: There is a consistent set of addressing features that a worker may use in any command to designate a particular structural node or some element of text or graphics attached to that node.

sentences.text: It adds appreciably to the power and flexibility of the system commands to have a rich, universally applicable vocabulary for directly addressing particular entities within the working files.
sentences.markdown: It adds appreciably to the power and flexibility of the system commands to have a rich, universally applicable vocabulary for directly addressing particular entities within the working files.

sentences.text: Below are some examples.
sentences.markdown: Below are some examples.

sentences.text: Explicit Statement Addresses
sentences.markdown: Explicit Statement Addresses

sentences.text: There are four "handles" by which a given statement may be directly addressed:
sentences.markdown: There are four "handles" by which a given statement may be directly addressed:

sentences.text: Structural Statement Number.
sentences.markdown: Structural Statement Number.

sentences.text: This designates the current "structural location" of the statement.
sentences.markdown: This designates the current "structural location" of the statement.

sentences.text: It is assigned by the system, depending upon where the worker installs or moves a statement within an existing structure, or how that structure might have been re-organized subsequently.
sentences.markdown: It is assigned by the system, depending upon where the worker installs or moves a statement within an existing structure, or how that structure might have been re-organized subsequently.

sentences.text: It is usually expressed as an alternating sequence of number-letter fields -- e.g. "1", "1a", "1a1", "1a2", and "1b".
sentences.markdown: It is usually expressed as an alternating sequence of number-letter fields -- e.g. "1", "1a", "1a1", "1a2", and "1b".

sentences.text: At a worker's option, these same statement numbers could be shown as "1", "1.1", "1.1.1", "1.1.2", or "1.2", but this bulkier alternative is seldom chosen.
sentences.markdown: At a worker's option, these same statement numbers could be shown as "1", "1.1", "1.1.1", "1.1.2", or "1.2", but this bulkier alternative is seldom chosen.

sentences.text: Statement Identifier (or SID).
sentences.markdown: Statement Identifier (or SID).

sentences.text: This is a unique integer, assigned in sequential order by the system as each statement is first inserted, and which stays with a statement no matter how much its content may be altered or where it may be moved in its file structure.
sentences.markdown: This is a unique integer, assigned in sequential order by the system as each statement is first inserted, and which stays with a statement no matter how much its content may be altered or where it may be moved in its file structure.

sentences.text: To make it uniquely recognizable for what it is, a SID is always displayed, printed, or designated with a prefixed "0" -- e.g., "012", "0417", etc. SIDs are particularly useful for referencing passages in a document while it is evolving.
sentences.markdown: To make it uniquely recognizable for what it is, a SID is always displayed, printed, or designated with a prefixed "0" -- e.g., "012", "0417", etc. SIDs are particularly useful for referencing passages in a document while it is evolving.

sentences.text: Worker-Assigned Statement Name (or label).
sentences.markdown: Worker-Assigned Statement Name (or label).

sentences.text: For any statement or part of the file structure, an author can designate as "name delimiters" a pair of characters that indicate to the system when the first word of a statement is to be treated as a name for that statement.
sentences.markdown: For any statement or part of the file structure, an author can designate as "name delimiters" a pair of characters that indicate to the system when the first word of a statement is to be treated as a name for that statement.

sentences.text: For instance, if "(" and ")" are set by the author as name delimiters for a specified part of the file, any parenthesized first word in a statement would be recognized by the system as that statement's name.
sentences.markdown: For instance, if "(" and ")" are set by the author as name delimiters for a specified part of the file, any parenthesized first word in a statement would be recognized by the system as that statement's name.

sentences.text: (Note: It is optional whether to have any of the above three identifiers displayed or printed with the statements' text.)
sentences.markdown: (Note: It is optional whether to have any of the above three identifiers displayed or printed with the statements' text.)

sentences.text: A Direct Screen Selection.
sentences.markdown: A Direct Screen Selection.

sentences.text: When a statement to be designated is displayed in a window, usually the best way to "address" it is to use the mouse to position the cursor anywhere on the statement and depress the mouse's "Select" key (indicated below by "<Select>").
sentences.markdown: When a statement to be designated is displayed in a window, usually the best way to "address" it is to use the mouse to position the cursor anywhere on the statement and depress the mouse's "Select" key (indicated below by "<Select>").

sentences.text: This mode is generally used for text manipulation -- selecting characters, words, numbers, visibles, invisibles, etc. (any of the text entities which have been made system recognizable).
sentences.markdown: This mode is generally used for text manipulation -- selecting characters, words, numbers, visibles, invisibles, etc. (any of the text entities which have been made system recognizable).

sentences.text: Markers
sentences.markdown: Markers

sentences.text: As one "holds a place" in a book by leaving a temporary place marker in it, an author can place "markers" at arbitrary locations within an AUGMENT file.
sentences.markdown: As one "holds a place" in a book by leaving a temporary place marker in it, an author can place "markers" at arbitrary locations within an AUGMENT file.

sentences.text: When placing a marker, he attaches it to a specific character in the text and gives it a name or label.
sentences.markdown: When placing a marker, he attaches it to a specific character in the text and gives it a name or label.

sentences.text: Marker names are local to each file.
sentences.markdown: Marker names are local to each file.

sentences.text: Simple commands provide for displaying where one's markers are located and what their names are, for deleting or moving a marker, or for installing a new one.
sentences.markdown: Simple commands provide for displaying where one's markers are located and what their names are, for deleting or moving a marker, or for installing a new one.

sentences.text: A marker name may be included in an address expression, to provide another way of designating an address.
sentences.markdown: A marker name may be included in an address expression, to provide another way of designating an address.

sentences.text: A marker name can designate not only a particular statement, but a specific character within that statement.
sentences.markdown: A marker name can designate not only a particular statement, but a specific character within that statement.

sentences.text: For example, "Copy Word #x (to follow word) <Select>" would designate that a word located somewhere in the file and marked with an "x" is to be copied to follow the cursor-selected word.
sentences.markdown: For example, "Copy Word #x (to follow word) <Select>" would designate that a word located somewhere in the file and marked with an "x" is to be copied to follow the cursor-selected word.

sentences.text: There are many unique ways in which markers may be employed by an author who has integrated their artful use into her working methodology.
sentences.markdown: There are many unique ways in which markers may be employed by an author who has integrated their artful use into her working methodology.

sentences.text: As a comparative example of some of the foregoing addressing forms, consider a statement whose SID is "069", whose statement number is "3b5", that has statement-name delimiters designated for it as "NULL" and ":", that starts with the text "Capacity: For every ...", and that has a marker named "x" positioned on one of its characters.
sentences.markdown: As a comparative example of some of the foregoing addressing forms, consider a statement whose SID is "069", whose statement number is "3b5", that has statement-name delimiters designated for it as "NULL" and ":", that starts with the text "Capacity: For every ...", and that has a marker named "x" positioned on one of its characters.

sentences.text: A command to move this statement could optionally be expressed as:
sentences.markdown: A command to move this statement could optionally be expressed as:

sentences.text: "Move Statement <Select> ...",
sentences.markdown: "Move Statement <Select> ...",

sentences.text: "Move Statement 3b5 ...",
sentences.markdown: "Move Statement 3b5 ...",

sentences.text: "Move Statement 069 ...",
sentences.markdown: "Move Statement 069 ...",

sentences.text: "Move Statement Capacity ...", or
sentences.markdown: "Move Statement Capacity ...", or

sentences.text: "Move Statement #x ...".
sentences.markdown: "Move Statement #x ...".

sentences.text: Relative-Address Extensions
sentences.markdown: Relative-Address Extensions

sentences.text: A sequence of characters may be appended to the address of a given statement to specify an address of a position "relative" to that statement.
sentences.markdown: A sequence of characters may be appended to the address of a given statement to specify an address of a position "relative" to that statement.

sentences.text: A major class of these designations deals with relative structural location, such as: Up a level, Down a level, Successor at same level, Predecessor at same level, Head at this level, Tail at this level, and End statement at last and lowest position in this branch.
sentences.markdown: A major class of these designations deals with relative structural location, such as: Up a level, Down a level, Successor at same level, Predecessor at same level, Head at this level, Tail at this level, and End statement at last and lowest position in this branch.

sentences.text: A period (".") in the address string indicates that relative addressing is beginning, and each of these relative-location designators is indicated with a directly mnemonic, one-letter designation.

sentences.text: For example, "Move Statement 0609 (to follow statement) 4b.dt" would move Statement 0609 to follow the tail statement of the substructure one level down from Statement 4b -- or, to conceptualize the associated address-location pathway, "go to 4b, then Down a level and to the Tail".

sentences.text: Embedded Citation Links
sentences.markdown: Embedded Citation Links

sentences.text: A special use of address expressions is within an explicit text entity that we call a "Citation Link" (or "Link" for short).
sentences.markdown: A special use of address expressions is within an explicit text entity that we call a "Citation Link" (or "Link" for short).

sentences.text: Links are used as textual citations to some specific file item within the workshop domain.
sentences.markdown: Links are used as textual citations to some specific file item within the workshop domain.

sentences.text: A link is delimited by parentheses or angle brackets and contains a valid address string whose path leads to the cited file entity.
sentences.markdown: A link is delimited by parentheses or angle brackets and contains a valid address string whose path leads to the cited file entity.

sentences.text: For example, "(0306)" or "(4b.dt)" are valid links.
sentences.markdown: For example, "(0306)" or "(4b.dt)" are valid links.

sentences.text: Also, the reference items at the end of this paper are statements named "Ref-1", "Ref-2", etc., and as such can be cited with links "<Ref-1>", "<Ref-2>", etc. An AUGMENT reader may travel via such a link directly to the referenced bibliographic citation.
sentences.markdown: Also, the reference items at the end of this paper are statements named "Ref-1", "Ref-2", etc., and as such can be cited with links "<Ref-1>", "<Ref-2>", etc. An AUGMENT reader may travel via such a link directly to the referenced bibliographic citation.

sentences.text: A special feature in AUGMENT's link provisions is the use of "indirect link referencing".
sentences.markdown: A special feature in AUGMENT's link provisions is the use of "indirect link referencing".

sentences.text: In path-following terms, including ".l" in an address string stipulates, "scan forward from this point to the next link, and follow that link to its target."
sentences.markdown: In path-following terms, including ".l" in an address string stipulates, "scan forward from this point to the next link, and follow that link to its target."

sentences.text: For example, to follow the path prescribed by link "(4b.l)", one would "go to 4b, then find the first link in that statement and follow the path that it specifies."
sentences.markdown: For example, to follow the path prescribed by link "(4b.l)", one would "go to 4b, then find the first link in that statement and follow the path that it specifies."

sentences.text: This latter path in turn could prescribe use of another link, etc. There is no intrinsic limit to the number of these indirect links that may be employed in a given path -- only a natural caution against such a path looping back upon itself.
sentences.markdown: This latter path in turn could prescribe use of another link, etc. There is no intrinsic limit to the number of these indirect links that may be employed in a given path -- only a natural caution against such a path looping back upon itself.

sentences.text: As an example, note that "<Ref-1>" is a link to the statement named "Ref-1", a bibliographic citation at the end of this paper.
sentences.markdown: As an example, note that "<Ref-1>" is a link to the statement named "Ref-1", a bibliographic citation at the end of this paper.

sentences.text: In that citation, there is a link to the original source document of the referenced publication, permanently stored in the AUGMENT Journal as Item 71279 (the Journal is described below).

sentences.text: The point to be made here is that with the link "<Ref-1.l>", I can reference the original source document -- and a Jump Link command would "take me there."

sentences.text: Text and Content Addressing
sentences.markdown: Text and Content Addressing

sentences.text: Other addressing options include scanning for a content match, and/or stepping backward and forward a given number of characters or words (or other text entities).
sentences.markdown: Other addressing options include scanning for a content match, and/or stepping backward and forward a given number of characters or words (or other text entities).

sentences.text: For instance, the foregoing link could have involved a bit more smarts in designating which link to follow: e.g., the path for '(4b "*D" .l)' would be "to 4b, scan for first occurrence of "*D", then follow the next link found in that statement."

sentences.text: Other-File Addressing
sentences.markdown: Other-File Addressing

sentences.text: By preceding an in-file address string with a file address, and separating the two strings with a comma, one obtains a composite address designating a given entity within a given file.
sentences.markdown: By preceding an in-file address string with a file address, and separating the two strings with a comma, one obtains a composite address designating a given entity within a given file.

sentences.text: Extending this principle lets one prefix the file name with a directory name in which the file is to be found; and further, one can prefix this with a host-computer name.
sentences.markdown: Extending this principle lets one prefix the file name with a directory name in which the file is to be found; and further, one can prefix this with a host-computer name.

sentences.text: For example, '(Office-5, Program-Documentation, Sequence-Doc, Specifications "Journal")' specifies the path: to the Office-5 host computer, to its Program-Documentation file directory, to its Sequence-Doc file, to its statement named "Specifications", and then scan to the location of the text "Journal".
sentences.markdown: For example, '(Office-5, Program-Documentation, Sequence-Doc, Specifications "Journal")' specifies the path: to the Office-5 host computer, to its Program-Documentation file directory, to its Sequence-Doc file, to its statement named "Specifications", and then scan to the location of the text "Journal".

sentences.text: If a person were working on the Office-5 host, he would only have to specify '(Program-Documentation, Sequence-Doc, Specifications "Journal")'.
sentences.markdown: If a person were working on the Office-5 host, he would only have to specify '(Program-Documentation, Sequence-Doc, Specifications "Journal")'.

sentences.text: If he were already working within a file with its "link default" set to the Program-Documentation directory, he would only have to specify '(Sequence-Doc, Specifications "Journal")'.
sentences.markdown: If he were already working within a file with its "link default" set to the Program-Documentation directory, he would only have to specify '(Sequence-Doc, Specifications "Journal")'.

sentences.text: And if he were already working within the Sequence-Doc file, he would only have to specify '(Specifications "Journal")'.
sentences.markdown: And if he were already working within the Sequence-Doc file, he would only have to specify '(Specifications "Journal")'.

sentences.text: And if he were planning to reference items relative to the Statement named "Specifications" very often, he could affix a marker (e.g., named "s") to its front and would then only have to specify '(#s "Journal")'.
sentences.markdown: And if he were planning to reference items relative to the Statement named "Specifications" very often, he could affix a marker (e.g., named "s") to its front and would then only have to specify '(#s "Journal")'.

sentences.text: Or, suppose he were working in another file in a different directory on Office-5 and wanted to reference items relative to that same "far off" statement with special ease: in some temporary place in that file he could install a statement named "Ref" (for example) containing the textual link, "(Program-Documentation, Sequence-Doc, Specifications)".

sentences.text: He could then cite the above reference with the link, '(Ref.l "Journal")'.
sentences.markdown: He could then cite the above reference with the link, '(Ref.l "Journal")'.

sentences.text: This is only a cursory treatment, but should illustrate well enough what is meant by "a rich and flexible addressing vocabulary."
sentences.markdown: This is only a cursory treatment, but should illustrate well enough what is meant by "a rich and flexible addressing vocabulary."

sentences.text: As with other high-performance features in AUGMENT, a beginner is not forced to become involved in the larger vocabulary in order to do useful work (with productivity on at least a par with some other, restricted-vocabulary system).
sentences.markdown: As with other high-performance features in AUGMENT, a beginner is not forced to become involved in the larger vocabulary in order to do useful work (with productivity on at least a par with some other, restricted-vocabulary system).

sentences.text: But an AUGMENT worker interested in higher performance can steadily pick up more of the optional vocabulary and skills in a smooth, upward-compatible progression.

sentences.text: Controlling the Views
sentences.markdown: Controlling the Views

sentences.text: A user of a book, or of most on-line text systems, is constrained to viewing the text as though he had a window through which he sees a fixed, formatted document.
sentences.markdown: A user of a book, or of most on-line text systems, is constrained to viewing the text as though he had a window through which he sees a fixed, formatted document.

sentences.text: But as described below, our worker can view a section of text in many ways, depending upon his need of the moment.
sentences.markdown: But as described below, our worker can view a section of text in many ways, depending upon his need of the moment.

sentences.text: Multiple Windows
sentences.markdown: Multiple Windows

sentences.text: For whatever total screen area is available to the worker, his general performance will be improved significantly if he can flexibly allocate that area into arbitrary-sized windows whose contents can be independently controlled.
sentences.markdown: For whatever total screen area is available to the worker, his general performance will be improved significantly if he can flexibly allocate that area into arbitrary-sized windows whose contents can be independently controlled.

sentences.text: AUGMENT has long provided this basic capability, along with the provision that material from any accessible file may be shown in any window, and also that screen-select copying or moving can be done across the different windows.
sentences.markdown: AUGMENT has long provided this basic capability, along with the provision that material from any accessible file may be shown in any window, and also that screen-select copying or moving can be done across the different windows.

sentences.text: (Note: Cross-file editing can be done at any time, between any two legally accessible files.
sentences.markdown: (Note: Cross-file editing can be done at any time, between any two legally accessible files.

sentences.text: If one or the other file's material or destination is not being displayed in any of the windows, one may always opt to employ a textual address expression instead of a <Select> within any editing command.)
sentences.markdown: If one or the other file's material or destination is not being displayed in any of the windows, one may always opt to employ a textual address expression instead of a <Select> within any editing command.)

sentences.text: User-adjustable parameters are used to control the view presented on the display.
sentences.markdown: User-adjustable parameters are used to control the view presented on the display.

sentences.text: Adjusting one's view parameters is a constantly used AUGMENT feature that has solidly proved its value.
sentences.markdown: Adjusting one's view parameters is a constantly used AUGMENT feature that has solidly proved its value.

sentences.text: To facilitate their quick and flexible use, the view-specification actions evolved into cryptic, single-character codes, called "viewspecs."
sentences.markdown: To facilitate their quick and flexible use, the view-specification actions evolved into cryptic, single-character codes, called "viewspecs."

sentences.text: The syntax of all Jump commands (used for traveling) includes the option of designating new viewspecs, and a special combination of mouse buttons enables quick, concurrent, keyset action to change the viewspecs for a given window.
sentences.markdown: The syntax of all Jump commands (used for traveling) includes the option of designating new viewspecs, and a special combination of mouse buttons enables quick, concurrent, keyset action to change the viewspecs for a given window.

sentences.text: Here are a few of the frequently used view controls:
sentences.markdown: Here are a few of the frequently used view controls:

sentences.text: Window Views
sentences.markdown: Window Views

sentences.text: Structure Cutoff.
sentences.markdown: Structure Cutoff.

sentences.text: Show only the statements that lie "below" this statement in the structure (i.e., this "branch"); or show only those following statements that are at this level or deeper; or show all of the following statements that will fit in this window.
sentences.markdown: Show only the statements that lie "below" this statement in the structure (i.e., this "branch"); or show only those following statements that are at this level or deeper; or show all of the following statements that will fit in this window.

sentences.text: Level Clipping.
sentences.markdown: Level Clipping.

sentences.text: For the designated structure cutoff, show only the statements down to a specified level.
sentences.markdown: For the designated structure cutoff, show only the statements down to a specified level.

sentences.text: Lower-level statements are "clipped" from the view; the worker can thus view just a selected number of the upper levels of his document/file.
sentences.markdown: Lower-level statements are "clipped" from the view; the worker can thus view just a selected number of the upper levels of his document/file.

sentences.text: Statement Truncation.
sentences.markdown: Statement Truncation.

sentences.text: For those statements brought into view (as selected by other view specifications), show only their first n lines.
sentences.markdown: For those statements brought into view (as selected by other view specifications), show only their first n lines.

sentences.text: Truncation to one line is often used, along with level clipping, in order to get an effective overview.
sentences.markdown: Truncation to one line is often used, along with level clipping, in order to get an effective overview.

sentences.text: Inter-Statement Separation.
sentences.markdown: Inter-Statement Separation.

sentences.text: For viewing ease -- blank lines can be optionally installed between statements.
sentences.markdown: For viewing ease -- blank lines can be optionally installed between statements.

sentences.text: (Note: The foregoing view controls are extremely helpful when studying and modifying a document's structural organization.)
sentences.markdown: (Note: The foregoing view controls are extremely helpful when studying and modifying a document's structural organization.)

sentences.text: Statement Numbers and Names.
sentences.markdown: Statement Numbers and Names.

sentences.text: Optionally, for a given window, show the Statement Number (or the SID) of each statement -- with an option for showing them at either the right or at the left margin.
sentences.markdown: Optionally, for a given window, show the Statement Number (or the SID) of each statement -- with an option for showing them at either the right or at the left margin.

sentences.text: Independently, the showing of statement names may be turned on or off.
sentences.markdown: Independently, the showing of statement names may be turned on or off.

sentences.text: Frozen Statements.
sentences.markdown: Frozen Statements.

sentences.text: A worker may select a number of statements, in random order, and designate them as "frozen."
sentences.markdown: A worker may select a number of statements, in random order, and designate them as "frozen."

sentences.text: One of the view-specification options is to have the frozen statements appear at the top of the frame, with the rest of that window left for normal viewing and editing.
sentences.markdown: One of the view-specification options is to have the frozen statements appear at the top of the frame, with the rest of that window left for normal viewing and editing.

sentences.text: The frozen statements may be edited, or even cross-edited between any other displayed (or addressable) statements.
sentences.markdown: The frozen statements may be edited, or even cross-edited between any other displayed (or addressable) statements.

sentences.text: User-Specified Content Filters.
sentences.markdown: User-Specified Content Filters.

sentences.text: A simple content-analysis language may be used in a "Set Content Pattern" command, which compiles a little content-checking program.
sentences.markdown: A simple content-analysis language may be used in a "Set Content Pattern" command, which compiles a little content-checking program.

sentences.text: One of the view-specification options will cause the system to display only those statements which satisfy both the structure and level conditions imposed by other viewspecs, and which also pass the content-analysis test applied by this program.
sentences.markdown: One of the view-specification options will cause the system to display only those statements which satisfy both the structure and level conditions imposed by other viewspecs, and which also pass the content-analysis test applied by this program.

sentences.text: Where desired, very sophisticated content-analysis programs may be written, using a full-blown programming language, and placed on call for any user.
sentences.markdown: Where desired, very sophisticated content-analysis programs may be written, using a full-blown programming language, and placed on call for any user.

sentences.text: User-Specified Sequence Generators
sentences.markdown: User-Specified Sequence Generators

sentences.text: In the foregoing, a "view" is created by beginning at a designated location in a document (file) and selecting certain of the the "following" statements for display, according to the viewing parameters -- possibly suppressing statements that don't pass the test of a content-analysis program.
sentences.markdown: In the foregoing, a "view" is created by beginning at a designated location in a document (file) and selecting certain of the the "following" statements for display, according to the viewing parameters -- possibly suppressing statements that don't pass the test of a content-analysis program.

sentences.text: This is essentially a "parameterized sequence generator," and provides very useful options for selectively viewing statements within a document; however, it works only by selectively discarding statements from a sequence provided in standard order.
sentences.markdown: This is essentially a "parameterized sequence generator," and provides very useful options for selectively viewing statements within a document; however, it works only by selectively discarding statements from a sequence provided in standard order.

sentences.text: Application programmers can provide alternate sequence-generator programs, which any user can invoke in a straightforward manner.
sentences.markdown: Application programmers can provide alternate sequence-generator programs, which any user can invoke in a straightforward manner.

sentences.text: In such a case, the apparent structure being presented to the user could be generated from a sequence of candidate statements according to any rules one may invent -- and the actual views could be further controlled by the above-described viewspecs for level clipping, truncation, content filtering, etc.
sentences.markdown: In such a case, the apparent structure being presented to the user could be generated from a sequence of candidate statements according to any rules one may invent -- and the actual views could be further controlled by the above-described viewspecs for level clipping, truncation, content filtering, etc.

sentences.text: Perhaps the most commonly used, special sequence generator is one that provides an "Include" feature, where specially tagged links embedded in the text will cause their cited passages to be "included" in place of the Include-Link statements, as though they were part of this file.
sentences.markdown: Perhaps the most commonly used, special sequence generator is one that provides an "Include" feature, where specially tagged links embedded in the text will cause their cited passages to be "included" in place of the Include-Link statements, as though they were part of this file.

sentences.text: This provision enables arbitrary assemblage of text and formatting directives, from a wide collection of files, to represent a virtual, one-document, super file.
sentences.markdown: This provision enables arbitrary assemblage of text and formatting directives, from a wide collection of files, to represent a virtual, one-document, super file.

sentences.text: For instance, the whole assemblage could be passed to the formatter, by means of a single user action, to generate a composite, photo-typeset document.
sentences.markdown: For instance, the whole assemblage could be passed to the formatter, by means of a single user action, to generate a composite, photo-typeset document.

sentences.text: Traveling Through the Working Files
sentences.markdown: Traveling Through the Working Files

sentences.text: An important provision in AUGMENT enables an author to freely "travel around" in his on-line file space to reach a particular "view point" of his choice -- i.e., the position within a file from which the system develops the desired form of "view" according to the currently invoked view specifications.
sentences.markdown: An important provision in AUGMENT enables an author to freely "travel around" in his on-line file space to reach a particular "view point" of his choice -- i.e., the position within a file from which the system develops the desired form of "view" according to the currently invoked view specifications.

sentences.text: Traveling from one view point to another is accomplished by Jump commands, of which the simplest perhaps is a direct Jump to a statement designated by a screen selection.
sentences.markdown: Traveling from one view point to another is accomplished by Jump commands, of which the simplest perhaps is a direct Jump to a statement designated by a screen selection.

sentences.text: Then, for a worker grown used to employing address strings, a next form would be a Jump on an embedded link, or to a statement designated by a typed-in address string -- using any combination of the addressing elements and viewspecs described above.
sentences.markdown: Then, for a worker grown used to employing address strings, a next form would be a Jump on an embedded link, or to a statement designated by a typed-in address string -- using any combination of the addressing elements and viewspecs described above.

sentences.text: For example, the link "<4b:mi>" points to the Statement 4b, while invoking viewspecs "m" and "I" which cause the statements' SIDs to be displayed.
sentences.markdown: For example, the link "<4b:mi>" points to the Statement 4b, while invoking viewspecs "m" and "I" which cause the statements' SIDs to be displayed.

sentences.text: The link "<Ref-1.l:i;LL>" points to the document referenced by the link in the statement named "Ref-1", invoking viewspec "i" for user content filtering, and sets the filter to "LL" to show only those statements beginning with a lower-case letter.
sentences.markdown: The link "<Ref-1.l:i;LL>" points to the document referenced by the link in the statement named "Ref-1", invoking viewspec "i" for user content filtering, and sets the filter to "LL" to show only those statements beginning with a lower-case letter.

sentences.text: The applications are effectively endless.

sentences.text: Modifying the Document Structures
sentences.markdown: Modifying the Document Structures

sentences.text: Given the array of capabilities described above, it is very simple also to provide for very flexible manipulation of the file structure.
sentences.markdown: Given the array of capabilities described above, it is very simple also to provide for very flexible manipulation of the file structure.

sentences.text: For operating on a small, basic set of structure-entity nouns, essentially the same basic verbs may be used as for text manipulation -- i.e. Insert, Delete, Move, Copy, Replace, and Transpose are quite sufficient for most cases.
sentences.markdown: For operating on a small, basic set of structure-entity nouns, essentially the same basic verbs may be used as for text manipulation -- i.e. Insert, Delete, Move, Copy, Replace, and Transpose are quite sufficient for most cases.

sentences.text: For instance, "Move Branch 2b (to follow) 3c" immediately moves Statement 2b and all of its substatements to follow Statement 3c -- and their statement numbers are automatically changed from 2b, 2b1, etc., to 3d, 3d1, etc.
sentences.markdown: For instance, "Move Branch 2b (to follow) 3c" immediately moves Statement 2b and all of its substatements to follow Statement 3c -- and their statement numbers are automatically changed from 2b, 2b1, etc., to 3d, 3d1, etc.

sentences.text: A few extra verbs are useful for structure manipulation.
sentences.markdown: A few extra verbs are useful for structure manipulation.

sentences.text: For instance, a "Break" command will break a given statement off at a designated point in its text string, and establish the rest of the text as a new, separate statement.
sentences.markdown: For instance, a "Break" command will break a given statement off at a designated point in its text string, and establish the rest of the text as a new, separate statement.

sentences.text: And an "Append" command does the reverse -- i.e., it appends the text of one or more existing statements to the end of a designated statement.

sentences.text: In our view, interactive computer support offers an author a priceless opportunity to get away from the geometric bondage inflicted by pages, margins, and lines -- things which have very little if any bearing upon the content and organization of one's text.
sentences.markdown: In our view, interactive computer support offers an author a priceless opportunity to get away from the geometric bondage inflicted by pages, margins, and lines -- things which have very little if any bearing upon the content and organization of one's text.

sentences.text: Electronic Mail.
sentences.markdown: Electronic Mail.

sentences.text: Its primary attributes of speed, automatic distribution, and computer-to-computer directness are well recognized -- and are generally accepted now as important to the effectiveness of knowledge workers.
sentences.markdown: Its primary attributes of speed, automatic distribution, and computer-to-computer directness are well recognized -- and are generally accepted now as important to the effectiveness of knowledge workers.

sentences.text: AUGMENT's mail system allows one to "send" complete, structured documents as well as small messages.
sentences.markdown: AUGMENT's mail system allows one to "send" complete, structured documents as well as small messages.

sentences.text: In an authorship environment, an important role for "electronic mail" is for the control and distribution of documents -- where small, throw-away messages are considered to be but a special class of document.
sentences.markdown: In an authorship environment, an important role for "electronic mail" is for the control and distribution of documents -- where small, throw-away messages are considered to be but a special class of document.

sentences.text: An author should be able to bundle up any combination of text and graphics, in the forms that he has been using for studying and manipulating them -- and send the bundle to other workers.
sentences.markdown: An author should be able to bundle up any combination of text and graphics, in the forms that he has been using for studying and manipulating them -- and send the bundle to other workers.

sentences.text: In AUGMENT, such a bundle is just like any other file structure, and can be studied and manipulated, incorporated into other files (documents), saved or deleted.
sentences.markdown: In AUGMENT, such a bundle is just like any other file structure, and can be studied and manipulated, incorporated into other files (documents), saved or deleted.

sentences.text: Recorded Mail -- AUGMENT's Journal System.
sentences.markdown: Recorded Mail -- AUGMENT's Journal System.

sentences.text: When mailing a document, an AUGMENT worker may optionally specify that it be installed as a "recorded" item.
sentences.markdown: When mailing a document, an AUGMENT worker may optionally specify that it be installed as a "recorded" item.

sentences.text: In this case, before distributing the item, the system will make a permanent record if it, as a file in a specified Journal collection.
sentences.markdown: In this case, before distributing the item, the system will make a permanent record if it, as a file in a specified Journal collection.

sentences.text: And, just as though it had been published, this recorded Journal item cannot later be changed.
sentences.markdown: And, just as though it had been published, this recorded Journal item cannot later be changed.

sentences.text: The system assigns a straightforward accession identifier (a simple number), and any authorized worker is henceforth guaranteed access to that Journal item by specifying the name of the Journal-collection and the Journal-item number -- e.g., as specified in the link "<OAD,2237,>".
sentences.markdown: The system assigns a straightforward accession identifier (a simple number), and any authorized worker is henceforth guaranteed access to that Journal item by specifying the name of the Journal-collection and the Journal-item number -- e.g., as specified in the link "<OAD,2237,>".

sentences.text: A given journal may be set up to serve multiple hosts and is much like a special library.
sentences.markdown: A given journal may be set up to serve multiple hosts and is much like a special library.

sentences.text: It has its collection of documents, and AUGMENT provides associated support processes for entry, cataloging, retrieval, and access.
sentences.markdown: It has its collection of documents, and AUGMENT provides associated support processes for entry, cataloging, retrieval, and access.

sentences.text: Together with the linking capability described above, a Journal system provides an extremely effective form of "recorded dialog."
sentences.markdown: Together with the linking capability described above, a Journal system provides an extremely effective form of "recorded dialog."

sentences.text: Cross-reference links between a succession of Journal items produces an inter-linked network of collaborative contributions -- plans, outlines, document drafts, schedules, short comments, detailed critiques, reference material, etc. The on-line worker can follow these links very easily and, using multiple windows and flexible viewing options, can make very effective use of such records.
sentences.markdown: Cross-reference links between a succession of Journal items produces an inter-linked network of collaborative contributions -- plans, outlines, document drafts, schedules, short comments, detailed critiques, reference material, etc. The on-line worker can follow these links very easily and, using multiple windows and flexible viewing options, can make very effective use of such records.

sentences.text: For instance, consider a detailed commentary directed toward a "preliminary design" document recorded in a given Journal collection.
sentences.markdown: For instance, consider a detailed commentary directed toward a "preliminary design" document recorded in a given Journal collection.

sentences.text: The author writing the commentary could view the design document in one window and his developing commentary document in another.
sentences.markdown: The author writing the commentary could view the design document in one window and his developing commentary document in another.

sentences.text: He can easily establish links in his commentary to cite any passage in the design document -- e.g., a statement, a term in the statement, or a diagram.
sentences.markdown: He can easily establish links in his commentary to cite any passage in the design document -- e.g., a statement, a term in the statement, or a diagram.

sentences.text: Then this author would submit his commentary into the Journal, perhaps specifying a list of colleagues for "distribution."
sentences.markdown: Then this author would submit his commentary into the Journal, perhaps specifying a list of colleagues for "distribution."

sentences.text: Each listed user would automatically receive a mail item announcing this new Journal entry, giving subject, author, date, etc., and the all-important link to the new Journal file containing the commentary.
sentences.markdown: Each listed user would automatically receive a mail item announcing this new Journal entry, giving subject, author, date, etc., and the all-important link to the new Journal file containing the commentary.

sentences.text: Any such recipient can subsequently study both the commentary and its cited planning document in a similar, multi-window, link-assisted manner.
sentences.markdown: Any such recipient can subsequently study both the commentary and its cited planning document in a similar, multi-window, link-assisted manner.

sentences.text: Furthermore, this second reader could develop and submit his own recorded commentary, which because of the citation power of AUGMENT links could be as short and to the point as: "Frankly, John, I think your comment in (DDD,xxx,aa) is a mistake!

sentences.text: Didn't you notice the earlier assumption in (DDD,xxx,bb)?
sentences.markdown: Didn't you notice the earlier assumption in (DDD,xxx,bb)?

sentences.text: Maybe you should go back to Tom's earlier requirements document -- especially at (EEE,yy,cc)."
sentences.markdown: Maybe you should go back to Tom's earlier requirements document -- especially at (EEE,yy,cc)."
